title: Assistant Store Manager - Evok - Apply Now

jsonLd.title: Assistant Store Manager - Evok - Apply Now
jsonLd.description:
We at Evok are looking for an experienced Assistant Store Manager based out of Ghaziabad. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Evok:
Evok is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual performance appraisal
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Ghaziabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Evok!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
